name: 5-Minute Perfect Webinar
origin: An abbreviated Perfect Webinar — origin story plus ONE secret and the close — running under 5 minutes. Used as Facebook/Instagram ad creative and as the sales video on unboxing/tripwire funnel pages, especially for products priced under $100.

whenToUse.summary: Use as a sub-5-minute sales video (origin story + one secret + close) for low-ticket (<$100) offers — as ad creative or as the VSL on a tripwire/unboxing/order page with a timed CTA reveal.
goals: Sell a low-ticket (<$100) impulse offer with a short video
Act as the sales video on a tripwire/unboxing/order page
signals: Needs short, scroll-stopping video for ads
Wants a VSL that drops onto a tripwire/unboxing order page
antiSignals: Mid/high-ticket offer needing full belief work (use Webinar / 90-min)
Audience needs deep teaching before buying

pageStructure.purpose: Play the sub-5-minute Perfect Webinar and reveal the CTA after the close.
keyElements: Embedded sub-5-minute video: origin story → ONE secret → close
Timed/delayed CTA button reveal (after the close)
skill44Widgets: Video embed with timed CTA reveal

pageStructure.purpose: Capture the low-ticket sale and lift AOV with a bump.
Add profit with a one-time upsell after purchase.

scripts: Video = 5-Minute Perfect Webinar (origin story + ONE secret + close), compressed
Headline, timed-CTA copy, ad hook, order urgency = Copywriting Secrets
copyFramework.notes: Compression is the skill: one belief, one story, one close, under 5 minutes. The same video doubles as the ad creative and the on-page VSL.

ghlBuild.funnelType: Short funnel (2-3 pages) — VSL → order → OTO
skill44Widgets: Video embed with timed/delayed CTA reveal
automations: Tie video as ad creative to the same VSL page via UTM
ghlBuild.notes: Skill 6 builds the short VSL page with timed CTA reveal, the order page, and the optional OTO; Skill 44 generates the order form + bump, the timed-CTA video block, and the one-click upsell. Same video is exported as FB/IG ad creative.
